ksa_text: Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, systematically evaluating trade-offs in requirements, feasibility, and constraints to select optimal approaches.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.
Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-A-001 (DA, Ability) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4520 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: onet=0.452, nist_ai_rmf=0.431, ddat=0.415. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4520 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-A-001 (DA, composite 0.4520) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles does not surface this DA-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4520 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DA domain content at composite 0.4520 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4520, domain DA. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
